commit_message: docs: add v2.0B chat-to-PR live proof
pr_body:
## Summary

This PR is the V2.0B chat-to-PR proof. It is intentionally docs-only and exists to prove the governed path from approved chat plan to GitHub pull request.

## Safety

- scoped GitHub token required
- docs-only file prefix
- generated branch
- rollback is close PR and delete generated branch

## Evidence

Generated by the Veloce V2.0 production execution control plane.
proof_markdown:
# V2.0B Chat-to-PR Live Proof

This docs-only file is the live proof target for V2.0B.

The control boundary is intentionally narrow: approved chat plan -> generated GitHub branch -> docs-only file update -> pull request -> audit ledger -> graph memory.
